title: Jobs
empty: No jobs yet. Create your first backup job.
vm_backup_note: Enter VM names separated by commas
database_dumps_hint: Creates database dumps for PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB before stopping containers (recommended!)
checksums_hint: Generates SHA256 checksums for all files to verify backup integrity (recommended!)
appdata_helbackup_excluded: The HELBACKUP container is automatically excluded and will not be backed up.
execute_confirm_message: This will start the backup job immediately. Continue?
delete_confirm_message: This action cannot be undone. All associated backup history will also be deleted.
name: Name
stop_order_hint: Containers are stopped top to bottom and restarted in reverse order
stop_order_note: Restart happens automatically in reverse order after backup completes
wizard_backup_types_hint: Select what to back up. Each type can be configured independently.
wizard_type_custom_desc: Back up any path not covered by the other backup types
wizard_type_helbackup_desc: Backs up HELBACKUP itself: all jobs, targets, backup records and SSH keys
custom_source_hint: Path inside the container, e.g. /unraid/user/data/my-folder. Do not use for Appdata, VMs, or Flash — use the dedicated types instead.
help_name: Give this job a descriptive name so you can identify it easily in the dashboard and history.
help_schedule: Set how often this backup should run automatically. Leave on "Manual" if you want to trigger it yourself.
help_backup_types: Each backup type backs up a different part of your Unraid system. You can enable as many as you need — each one can be configured to use a different target.
encryption_timing_note: Note: Encryption is applied after the backup completes. During the backup, data briefly exists unencrypted on the target.
stop_delay_hint: Extra buffer after stopping each container. docker stop already waits for graceful shutdown — this gives containers time to fully flush file buffers. Recommended: 5–10 s for database containers, 0–2 s for stateless apps.
restart_delay_hint: Wait time after restarting each container, to allow full initialization. Set to 0 if containers need no startup time.
retention_per_type_hint: Tip: For different retention per backup type, use separate targets — targets support their own retention policies including GFS (daily / weekly / monthly).
